cited_facts.why_it_matters: This fact describes the technical changes of fix1578, specifically correcting transaction result codes for OfferCreate and TrustSet. However, it does not contain any information regarding the default vote configuration in the source code or release notes.
This fact explains the general voting process and consequences of amendments but does not specify the default vote for fix1578.

output_json.decision_summary: The provided packet facts describe the technical behavior of the fix1578 amendment, the general amendment voting process, and the version in which it was introduced. None of the facts explicitly state or imply the default vote (YES or NO) configured in the latest stable release source code. Without explicit evidence of the default vote setting, the task rule requires outputting UNKNOWN.
output_json.forbidden_stronger_claim: This output is a replay classification, not proof of amendment correctness.
